versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, dispatch, receipt, mismatch, evaluation handoff, incident, vendor API, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible shipment direction, vendor type, report, screen, SLA or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
